name: Support subscription pause policy example
answer:
Customers can pause a subscription within 14 days of the renewal date.
Customers can pause a subscription within 30 days of the renewal date.
Paused subscriptions receive an automatic prorated refund.

sources.title: Support Subscription Pause Policy
sources.content:
Customers can pause a subscription within 14 days of the renewal date.
Paused subscriptions remain available until the current billing period ends.
